shared_case_surface: bounded change cases that keep ambiguity class, handling move, assumption boundary, and failure-versus-readout distinctions inspectable on the same task-meaning ambiguity surface
bounded_replacement_rule: A local repo may replace the concrete cases only if it preserves the same task-meaning ambiguity question, keeps the ambiguity-bearing request and resulting handling move jointly inspectable, and still covers incomplete requirements, conflicting instructions, underspecified acceptance criteria, bounded disclosed fallback assumptions, and silent path-choice pressure without collapsing permission ambiguity into meaning ambiguity or treating one house-style answer as implicitly correct.
public_safe_requirements: a bounded outside reviewer can see why more than one interpretation exists
authority or permission uncertainty stays separate from task-meaning ambiguity
clarification, branching, and bounded assumptions stay reviewable as distinct handling moves
the public readout stays weaker than the ambiguity-bearing evidence
